title: The Worst Generation Stands Before Kaido and Big Mom
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy, Kid as The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
scene: The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Mom, guess what this kid said to my face!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's just a run!! He had the same haughty attitude when he faced me as well!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He destroyed my Castiel you owe me an apology. Straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey Kid! I dare you... say it one more time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We wouldn't dare show our faces to him after this!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The Worst Generation Reaches the Roof storyline with 23 dialogue beats. The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
